title: Surveillance Package (FNAF Management Wanted)
body:
[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zeus_Kitchen/MP_ZeusKitchen_promo.webp)](https://www.renars.dev/bisect) ![](https://i.imgur.com/kCZq93u.png)

The Surveillance Package for FNAF: Management Wanted     

The Mod includes Security Cameras, Security Tablet, and a Hotkey to Crawl! Perfect for FNAF Pizzerias.

![](https://i.imgur.com/AVDORLE.png) [![](https://i.imgur.com/fUB6QSk.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/management-wanted) [![](https://i.imgur.com/zdNOrSK.png)](https://discord.gg/ovdr) [![](https://i.imgur.com/MJmyxBT.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@ovdr) [![](https://i.imgur.com/awtHmxq.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)    ![](https://i.imgur.com/AVDORLE.png)

Use your Security Cameras by placing them either on a wall or roof and right-click it with a Tablet

**You can craft Cameras and Tablets in Survival with Copper, Iron, Redstone, and Glass Panes.**

Press **U** to Lock Starting Camera Rotation

Press **Z** to Crawl

Use a **Stick** or **MW's Faz-Wrench** to edit the Camera

![](https://i.imgur.com/AVDORLE.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/3eKQJFt.png)

**By OVDR Studios and Clockwork Interactive**

Zeus - Coding

OVDR - Organizer

YesMan2 - Models and Textures

SmollDave - Item Textures
